n: Book 3, Chapter 1: A Need for Secrecy

steps.t: Haradrim fleeing in the direction of the town of Erynos, east and north of Aragorn's camp, must be defeated before they can bring word of his victory …
Haradrim fleeing in the direction of the town of Erynos, east and north of Aragorn's camp, must be defeated before they can bring word of his victory …
Thurineth has some news for you at the gate of Erynos. You defeated several of the Haradrim that fled from Pelargir, and a woman has hailed you from t…
Thurineth saw a Haradrim sorcerer creeping around the outer wall of the town of Erynos, and wanted you to defeat him before you leave.
Aragorn is at the Camp of the Grey Host, to the north-west of Pelargir. You have tracked down and defeated the Haradrim warriors that fled from Pelarg…
